name: hr-salary-system
description: HR Intelligence & Salary Processing Platform — Indriyan Beverages / Asian Lakto Ind. Ltd.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.build:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,UI" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
